caption: Three people are seated on a stage during a panel discussion, set against a dark background with vibrant purple lighting and geometric shapes. A man on the left wears a white button-down shirt and dark trousers, a woman in the center wears a black t-shirt and black pants, and a man on the right wears a grey suit over a light blue shirt. They are seated in light-colored wooden chairs. In front of the man on the left and the man on the right are white, industrial-looking rectangular boxes with various components visible. To the right of the stage, the letters "SL" are visible in a bright pink glow. Throughout the sequence, the man on the left gestures with his hands while speaking, shifting from a folded-hand position to active hand movements. The woman and the man in the suit remain relatively still, listening and looking toward the speaker.
